title: triosteum aurantiacum var. illinoense
intro: Triosteum aurantiacum var. illinoense, also known as Illinois horse gentian, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Triosteum genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Illinois horse gentian include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its roots or leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
